ddls:
CREATE TABLE "safety_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the safety question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the safety question */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the safety question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety requirement */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related safety question */,
  "not_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is not required */,
  "required_1_to_5_times" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required 1 to 5 times per day */,
  "required_6_to_10_times" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required 6 to 10 times per day */,
  "required_half_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required for half a day */,
  "required_less_half_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required for less than half a day */,
  "required_more_half_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required for more than half a day */,
  "yes" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is generally required */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the requirement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_requirements_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES safety_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the safety question being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the assessment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the assessment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES safety_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., safety officer, manager, employee) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Primary location of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user attending the training */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered during the training */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the training session took place */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Instructor who conducted the training */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related assessment */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the compliance report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location for which the report was generated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "status" TEXT /* Overall status of the report (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
